title: KINGLAKE 3 Rolls x 6 Yards Christmas Wired Ribbon for Wreath Bows Making, 2.5 Inch Tartan Wide Brown Red Black Burlap Hessian Ribbon for Gift Wrapping Xmas Tree Decorations
features: [Three Classic Christmas Designs] – Includes 3 rolls of wired ribbon in different rustic plaid styles: full buffalo check, jute-look with plaid edges, and plaid with natural stripe. It adds to the festive atmosphere. Each roll measures 6.4 cm wide and 6 yards long, can be used alone or in combination to create a stronger sense of layering, enough materials and various styles to meet different needs.

[Rustic Plaid Design] – A mix of red and black checks with natural jute tones creates a farmhouse-inspired festive style. The bold checks and neutral burlap accents blend traditional and rustic charm, making them perfect for Christmas and seasonal crafts. The spool design keeps the ribbon neatly wound and tangle-free, and easy to cut.

[Easy to Shape] - Designed with flexible wired edges, the ribbon bends and holds its form with ease. Ideal for making full bows, three-dimensional shapes or layered wraps. Whether for gift boxes, bags, baskets or handmade projects, it ensures your presents or decoration looks neat and eye-catching.

[Durable Burlap Texture] - Crafted from strong woven burlap, the thick Christmas ribbon offers a natural and vintage textured look. The reinforced edges prevent fraying, while the dense weave resists tearing. Not easy to fading but built to last, it can be reused across multiple seasons.

[Versatile Holiday Uses] - From Christmas trees, wreaths and garlands to stair rails, doors, mantelpieces and table settings, this wire ribbon brings a traditional yet cheerful festive touch to any space. It is also ideal for parties, DIY crafts and creative home décor, making it a must-have for the holiday season.
description: Specifications: Material: Burlap-look woven fabric with wired edges Color: Red and black plaid with natural jute tones Pattern: 3 classic rustic styles – full buffalo check, jute-look with plaid edges, and plaid with natural stripe Width: 6.4 cm / 2.5 inches Length: 6 yards / 5.5 metres each roll Package Included: 3 rolls of brown black and red wired Christmas ribbons Features: Rustic Plaid Ribbon Set – This three-roll pack offers a mix of red and black buffalo check and jute-look designs, perfect for creating a farmhouse-inspired festive style. The classic checks and natural tones bring warmth and tradition to your Christmas decorating. Wire Edged Ribbon – Designed with flexible wired edges, these ribbons are easy to twist, fold and shape into full bows or creative craft designs that hold beautifully in place. Durable and Reusable – Made from strong woven fabric with reinforced edges, the wide wired ribbon resist fraying and fading. Built to last, they can be reused across multiple holiday seasons without losing their charm. Versatile Uses – Ribbon with wire edges can not only be used as Christmas wreath ribbon or Christmas tree ribbon, but also suitable for wrapping gifts, decorating garlands, table settings,or adding charm to stair rails, mantelpieces and party décor. With three different patterns, this set gives you more choice for DIY projects, festive décor and creative home styling.
